case_title: RICHARDSON, RODERICK et al vs. MARY ANN BAKING COMPANY

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-15-1993, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), AND WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED FOR FTC W/ CT RULES. $25 SANCTIONS PAID, FT# 5A15P107. HEARING SET FOR DEC-16-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RICHARDSON, RODERICK

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF AUG-16-1993, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON AUG-16-1993, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR SEP-15-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RICHARDSON, RODERICK MOSELEY, EARNEST WILLIAMS, VINCENT

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RICHARDSON, RODERICK MOSELEY, EARNEST WILLIAMS, VINCENT AS TO DEFENDANT MARY ANN BAKING COMPANY SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUN-17-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-19-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAY-28-1993

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-17-1993, CONTINUED TO AUG-16-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 PLTF. MUST GIVE NOTICE. SANCTIONS IMPOSED AGAINST PLTF'S COUNSEL FOR $100 FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE RULES, STAYED TO 8/16/93. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-15-1993, CONTINUED TO OCT-15-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $25.00 IMPOSED, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE 10/15/93. FOR PROOF OF SERVICE, ANSWER OR DEFAULT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF RICHARDSON, RODERICK MOSELEY, EARNEST WILLIAMS, VINCENT
OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-16-1993, OFF CALENDAR
PHOTOCOPY FOR THIRD PARTY LAW OFFICES OF A. R. MCCLOSKEY
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
